title: New Pendo Script Installation and Verification
description:
Install the updated Pendo tracking script in the application's HTML head section with improved user and account identification. The previous installation (MBT-183) placed the script at the end of the page; this moves it to the head.

Key changes:
- Each user is assigned a unique alphanumeric `dtUserId` string upon Salesforce authentication
- Visitor ID is composed as `dtUserId.userId` (e.g., "abc123.2")
- Account ID is composed as `dtUserId.teamId` (e.g., "abc123.6")
- User's subscription plan is passed as metadata

Verification follows Pendo's standard process:
1. Check raw events in App Settings > Applications > Raw Events
2. Validate with `pendo.validateEnvironment()` in the browser developer console
3. Confirm visitor and account metadata matches the data sent by the agent

Pendo data may take up to two hours for initial data to appear. JavaScript is served from Amazon CloudFront CDN (~100KB minified, compressed) and transmits data via TLS every two minutes.
acceptance_criteria: Pendo script is installed in the HTML head section
Each user is assigned a unique dtUserId alphanumeric string upon Salesforce authentication
Visitor ID is composed as dtUserId + user ID
Account ID is composed as dtUserId + team ID
User's subscription plan is passed as Pendo metadata
Installation can be verified via Pendo App Settings raw events
pendo.validateEnvironment() returns correct visitor and account metadata in browser console
Full name is not included in Pendo metadata
middleware_changes: Generates and assigns a unique alphanumeric dtUserId to each user during Salesforce authentication. Composes Pendo visitor and account IDs from this string combined with the numeric user and team IDs.
data_model_changes: New `dtUserId` field on the users model storing a random alphanumeric identifier string generated at authentication time.
implementation_notes: The dtUserId approach was chosen to avoid exposing raw sequential integer IDs to Pendo. User ID 2 with dtUserId 'abc123' becomes visitor 'abc123.2'. This ensures consistent ID sizes as the user base grows. Data is transmitted securely via TLS from the browser to Pendo servers every two minutes and on page unload.
comment_summary: Waqar generated a random alphanumeric dtUserId saved to the users model upon Salesforce authentication. Visitor ID is formatted as dtUserId.userId and account ID as dtUserId.teamId, verified via the browser console. Ryan approved the approach.
